display_name: VLAN creation and member assignment to ASIC
trigger: User runs 'config vlan add <vid>' and 'config vlan member add <vid> <port>'

steps.action: User runs 'config vlan add 100'. CLI validates the VID range (2-4094), checks for duplicates, then calls config_db.set_entry('VLAN', 'Vlan100', {'vlanid': '100'}) via ValidatedConfigDBConnector, writing the VLAN entry to CONFIG_DB.

vlanmgrd main loop receives CONFIG_DB VLAN table notification via ConsumerStateTable. Dispatches to doVlanTask(), which calls addHostVlan() to create a Linux VLAN sub-interface ('ip link add link Bridge up name Vlan100 type vlan id 100' and 'bridge vlan add vid 100 dev Bridge self'), then publishes to APPL_DB VLAN_TABLE and sets STATE_DB VLAN_TABLE state=ok.
steps.verify: redis-cli -n 0 HGETALL 'VLAN_TABLE:Vlan100' && ip link show Vlan100

steps.action: orchagent is notified of APPL_DB VLAN_TABLE SET event via ConsumerStateTable. doTask() dispatches to doVlanTask(), which calls addVlan() — this calls sai_vlan_api->create_vlan() with SAI_VLAN_ATTR_VLAN_ID=100. The sairedis RedisRemoteSaiInterface serializes the create request and writes it to ASIC_DB as a CREATE command, then blocks waiting for syncd acknowledgment.

syncd reads the CREATE entry from ASIC_DB channel. processSingleEvent() dispatches to processQuadEvent(SAI_COMMON_API_CREATE), which calls processOid(), which calls processOidCreate(). This calls m_vendorSai->create(SAI_OBJECT_TYPE_VLAN, ...) which invokes the vendor SAI library via sai_metadata_generic_create() to program the hardware VLAN table. syncd sends the SAI response OID back and updates the VID-to-RID mapping in ASIC_DB.
steps.output: VLAN 100 created in hardware; VID-to-RID mapping stored in ASIC_DB VIDTORID

steps.action: User runs 'config vlan member add 100 Ethernet0'. CLI validates the port and VLAN exist, checks tagging mode, and writes VLAN_MEMBER entry to CONFIG_DB via config_db.set_entry('VLAN_MEMBER', ('Vlan100', 'Ethernet0'), {'tagging_mode': 'tagged'}).

vlanmgrd receives CONFIG_DB VLAN_MEMBER table notification. doVlanMemberTask() checks that the member port is in STATE_DB (port is ready) and the VLAN state is ok. Calls addHostVlanMember() to run 'ip link set Ethernet0 master Bridge && bridge vlan add vid 100 dev Ethernet0'. Then publishes VLAN_MEMBER to APPL_DB VLAN_MEMBER_TABLE and sets STATE_DB VLAN_MEMBER_TABLE state=ok.
steps.verify: redis-cli -n 0 HGETALL 'VLAN_MEMBER_TABLE:Vlan100:Ethernet0' && bridge vlan show dev Ethernet0

steps.action: orchagent is notified of APPL_DB VLAN_MEMBER_TABLE SET event. doVlanMemberTask() resolves the port object, calls addBridgePort() to create a SAI bridge port (SAI_OBJECT_TYPE_BRIDGE_PORT) if not already created, then calls addVlanMember() which calls sai_vlan_api->create_vlan_member() with SAI_VLAN_MEMBER_ATTR_VLAN_ID, SAI_VLAN_MEMBER_ATTR_BRIDGE_PORT_ID, and SAI_VLAN_MEMBER_ATTR_VLAN_TAGGING_MODE. sairedis writes to ASIC_DB.

syncd reads the VLAN_MEMBER CREATE from ASIC_DB channel. processSingleEvent() -> processQuadEvent(SAI_COMMON_API_CREATE) -> processOid() -> processOidCreate() calls m_vendorSai->create(SAI_OBJECT_TYPE_VLAN_MEMBER, ...) which invokes the vendor SAI library to associate the port with the VLAN in hardware. VID-to-RID mapping for the vlan_member object is stored in ASIC_DB.
steps.output: Port Ethernet0 associated with VLAN 100 in hardware; tagged/untagged mode set

failure_injection_points.failure: vlanmgrd not running or crashing on startup
failure_injection_points.symptom: CONFIG_DB has VLAN entry but APPL_DB VLAN_TABLE is empty; 'ip link show Vlan100' shows no interface
failure_injection_points.diagnosis: docker exec swss supervisorctl status vlanmgrd; check /var/log/swss/vlanmgrd.log; verify device MAC is present: redis-cli -n 4 HGET 'DEVICE_METADATA|localhost' mac

failure_injection_points.symptom: APPL_DB VLAN_TABLE:Vlan100 exists but ASIC_DB has no SAI_OBJECT_TYPE_VLAN entry; Linux Vlan100 interface exists
failure_injection_points.diagnosis: docker exec swss supervisorctl status orchagent; check /var/log/swss/orchagent.log for errors; verify APPL_DB consumer is active: redis-cli -n 0 KEYS '_VLAN_TABLE*'

failure_injection_points.symptom: ASIC_DB shows SAI_OBJECT_TYPE_VLAN entry but 'show vlan brief' shows no VLAN or VLAN missing in hardware
failure_injection_points.diagnosis: docker exec syncd supervisorctl status syncd; check /var/log/syncd.log for SAI error codes; verify ASIC_DB response: redis-cli -n 1 HGETALL 'ASIC_STATE:SAI_OBJECT_TYPE_VLAN:<oid>'

failure_injection_points.failure: vlanmgrd member task blocked waiting for port to be ready
failure_injection_points.symptom: CONFIG_DB has VLAN_MEMBER entry but APPL_DB VLAN_MEMBER_TABLE is empty; bridge vlan show does not list the port
failure_injection_points.diagnosis: Check if port is in STATE_DB: redis-cli -n 6 HGETALL 'PORT_TABLE|Ethernet0'; if port is down or not initialized, vlanmgrd defers; check /var/log/swss/vlanmgrd.log for 'not ready, delaying'

failure_injection_points.failure: orchagent cannot find VLAN object when processing VLAN_MEMBER
failure_injection_points.symptom: APPL_DB VLAN_MEMBER_TABLE entry exists but no ASIC_STATE:SAI_OBJECT_TYPE_VLAN_MEMBER created; orchagent logs 'Failed to locate VLAN'
failure_injection_points.diagnosis: Verify VLAN itself was created: redis-cli -n 1 KEYS 'ASIC_STATE:SAI_OBJECT_TYPE_VLAN:*'; check orchagent portList for the VLAN; may indicate out-of-order event processing

failure_injection_points.symptom: ASIC_DB has VLAN_MEMBER entry but port does not pass traffic on the VLAN; SAI returns error
failure_injection_points.diagnosis: Check /var/log/syncd.log for SAI_STATUS errors on VLAN_MEMBER create; verify bridge_port OID is valid: redis-cli -n 1 KEYS 'ASIC_STATE:SAI_OBJECT_TYPE_BRIDGE_PORT:*'; hardware VLAN table may be full
